allow: Bash(curl -s -A 'Mozilla/5.0 \(Windows NT 10.0; Win64; x64\) AppleWebKit/537.36' -X POST -d 'criterioAgrotoxico=&criterioIngredienteAtivo=&criterioRegistrante=&criterioClassificacaoToxicologica=&criterioPraga=&criterioSituacao=&criterioClasse=&criterioCulturaInfestada=&criterioExpurgo=&criterioAplicacaoAerea=&criterioTratamentoSementes=&select11=null&select1=&select5=null&select4=null&select9=null&select6=null&select3=null&select7=null&descIngrediente=&numeroRegistro=&ClassificacaoQuiBio=QUI&submit1=Pesquisar' https://celepar07web.pr.gov.br/agrotoxicos/resultadoPesquisa.asp)

PowerShell($env:PATH = $env:PATH + ";" + \(npm root -g\); npm exec -g -- pm2-windows-startup install 2>&1)
PowerShell(New-NetFirewallRule -DisplayName "Celepar Scraper :3000" -Direction Inbound -Protocol TCP -LocalPort 3000 -Action Allow -Profile Any 2>&1)
Bash(python3 -c "import sys; content=sys.stdin.read\(\); start=content.find\('<form'\); end=content.find\('</form>'\)+7; print\(content[start:end]\)")

PowerShell($r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "https://celepar07web.pr.gov.br/agrotoxicos/pesquisar.asp" -UseBasicParsing -UserAgent "Mozilla/5.0"; Write-Host "Status: $\($r.StatusCode\)"; Write-Host "Length: $\($r.RawContent.Length\)"; $r.RawContent | Select-String "action|input|name=" | Select-Object -First 40)
